title: Getting Started with OmniBioAI
desc: Complete walkthrough of the platform — setup, configuration and first run.

title: RNA-Seq Analysis End-to-End
desc: From raw FASTQ files to differential expression results using the Workflow Runner.

title: Single Cell RNA-Seq with Scanpy
desc: Clustering, UMAP visualization and marker identification on 10X Genomics data.

title: Variant Calling Pipeline
desc: BWA + GATK HaplotypeCaller pipeline with annotation via SnpEff.

title: Running Jobs on HPC with Slurm
desc: Configure TES to submit bioinformatics jobs to your institutional cluster.

title: Literature AI — Search 36M PubMed Papers
desc: 9-stage RAG pipeline demo — hybrid search, re-ranking and LLM reasoning over 36M abstracts.

title: Lab Integrations — Benchling, REDCap & eLabFTW
desc: Import samples from Benchling, patient cohorts from REDCap, and export results to eLabFTW ELN.

title: Variant Annotation — gnomAD, ClinVar & COSMIC
desc: Annotate VCF files locally with population frequencies, clinical significance and cancer mutations.

title: Drug Discovery & Target Identification
desc: GNN-based drug-target interaction prediction and pathway-level disease modeling.

title: Control Center & Platform Monitoring
desc: Real-time health dashboard for 26+ microservices, Grafana metrics and Discord alerts.
